sourcesContent:
Flatpickr - Datepicker

Set mwlFlatpickr [altInput]="true" [convertModelValue]="true" attribute.

Set mwlFlatpickr [altInput]="true" [enableTime]="true" [convertModelValue]="true" altFormat="d.m.y H:i" [dateFormat]="'d.m.y H:i'" attribute.

Set mwlFlatpickr [altInput]="true" [convertModelValue]="true" altFormat="F j, Y" dateFormat="Y-m-d" attribute.

Set mwlFlatpickr [altInput]="true" minDate="25-01-2023" maxDate="29-01-2023" [convertModelValue]="true" altFormat="d M, Y" dateFormat="d M, Y" attribute.

Set mwlFlatpickr [altInput]="true" [defaultValue]="'25-01-2023'" altFormat="d M, Y" dateFormat="d M, Y" attribute.

Set mwlFlatpickr [altInput]="true" [convertModelValue]="true" altFormat="d M, Y" dateFormat="d M, Y" attribute.

Set mwlFlatpickr [altInput]="true" [convertModelValue]="true" mode="multiple" altFormat="d M, Y" dateFormat="d M, Y" attribute.

Set mwlFlatpickr [altInput]="true" [convertModelValue]="true" mode="range" altFormat="d M, Y" dateFormat="d M, Y" attribute.

Set mwlFlatpickr [altInput]="true" [convertModelValue]="true" [inline]="true" attribute.

Flatpickr - Timepicker

Set mwlFlatpickr [noCalendar]="true" [enableTime]="true" [dateFormat]="'H:i'" attribute.

Colorpicker

Themes
Classic Demo

Use [style.background]="componentcolor" [(colorPicker)]="componentcolor" [cpPosition]="'bottom'" attribute to set classic colorpicker.

Monolith Demo

Use [style.background]="monolith" [(colorPicker)]="monolith" [cpPosition]="'bottom'" [cpPresetColors]="['#fff','#000','#2889e9','#e920e9','#fff500','rgb(236,64,64)']" attribute to set monolith colorpicker.

Nano Demo

Use [style.background]="nano" [(colorPicker)]="nano" [cpPosition]="'bottom'" [cpDisableInput]="true" attribute to set nano colorpicker.
